structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-22 CalHFA Relaunch
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-22 08:29:41-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

Effective 6/5/2025, NOVA is pleased to announce a relaunch with CalHFA, which offers down payment assistance (DPA) programs in the State of California.  CalHFA provides low-interest rate home financing options to low-to-moderate income homebuyers in the realization of their goal of homeownership in California, as well as down payment and closing cost assistance.  New Lender Training has been scheduled for next week, invites to follow!

 

At NOVA’s discretion, it has been decided that loan officers who would like to participate in the program are not required to take part in program training to begin originating the loans. However, please reference the following links which provide additional support for the CalHFA programs including the loan scenario calculator and the program handbooks for each program: 

*	Loan Scenario Calculator <https://www.calhfa.ca.gov/calc/scenario.html> :

	*	Use this calculator to compare CalHFA loans
	*	This tool is intended for loan officers and is for estimation purposes only, final loan figures may be different

*	Rates & Reservations for Lenders, Real Estate Agents, Non-Profits | CalHFA <https://www.calhfa.ca.gov/homeownership/rates/index.htm#reservations> 
*	Loan Program Handbook for Lenders, Real Estate Agents, Non-Profits | CalHFA <https://www.calhfa.ca.gov/homeownership/programs/index.htm> 

 

Program Details: 

First Mortgages

Programs: CalHFA/CalReady, CalPLUS, CalPLUS Access

FICO Requirements: 680 (Conventional), 640 (Government)

Max DTI: 45% (50% with 700+ FICO)

LTV / CLTV Ratios:

*	97% / 105% Conventional (95% for manufactured homes)
*	96.5% / 105% FHA
*	100% / 105% VA and USDA

	
 

Second Lien – MyHome

*	Up to 3% of appraised value or sales price (whichever is lower)

	*	Up to 3.5% for FHA

*	Borrower education required

 

Third Lien – Behind MyHome (Conventional & FHA Only)

ZIP (Zero Interest Program)

*	Used only with CalPLUS

*	Closing cost assistance only

*	2% or 3% of first mortgage loan amount

MyAccess

*	Used only with CalPLUS Access

*	Down payment & closing cost assistance

*	2.5% of first mortgage total loan amount

 

Important Notes:

*	Please refer to the following landing page for CalHFA pricing, guideline, selling strategy, training, and marketing resources

	*	 CalHFA <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/:f:/s/Home/Ek0hiUKsjglGlqjO-NBsLf4BdZI-PbWSLjJHjWdWfd94Gg?e=fxu6Gb>
